summary: Iteration 19: Email Receipt Feature Testing - All backend and frontend tests passed. Backend: 10/10 tests passed for verify-payment, checkout email storage, and graceful RESEND_API_KEY handling. Frontend: Email prompt modal works correctly with data-testid attributes, email validation (@), Cancel button, and successful Stripe checkout redirect.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/resume/checkout stores customer email in resume_payments collection
Backend: POST /api/resume/verify-payment returns {paid: true/false} without crashing (even without RESEND_API_KEY)
Backend: verify-payment handles invalid session_id gracefully (returns paid=false)
Backend: verify-payment returns 400 when session_id is missing
Backend: checkout works with empty email (backwards compatible)
Backend: checkout handles email with special chars (test+receipt@sub.example.com)
Backend: pricing endpoint returns correct data
Backend: send_payment_receipt gracefully skips when RESEND_API_KEY not set (code review verified - line 38-40)
Frontend: Clicking Pay button shows email prompt modal
Frontend: data-testid='email-prompt-title' exists on modal title (shows 'Almost there!')
Frontend: data-testid='checkout-email-input' exists on email input field
Frontend: data-testid='proceed-to-payment-btn' exists on proceed button
Frontend: Email validation shows toast error for invalid email (without @)
Frontend: Cancel button closes the email prompt modal
Frontend: After valid email entry, clicking 'Proceed to Payment' redirects to Stripe checkout
critical_code_review_comments: send_payment_receipt() at line 34-80: Correctly handles missing RESEND_API_KEY by logging info message and returning early (line 38-40)
send_payment_receipt() has proper try/except for email sending failures (line 79-80)
verify-payment endpoint at line 424-454: Uses BackgroundTasks to send receipt email asynchronously (doesn't block API response)
checkout endpoint at line 391-415: Correctly stores customer email in resume_payments collection (line 412)
verify-payment retrieves email from resume_payments (line 441) and passes to send_payment_receipt (line 450)
Frontend email prompt modal at lines 896-942: Has all required data-testid attributes and validation logic
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email receipt feature is fully implemented and tested. (1) When user clicks Pay button, email prompt modal appears first to collect email. (2) After entering valid email and proceeding, checkout creates session with email stored. (3) After successful Stripe payment verification, send_payment_receipt is called via BackgroundTasks. (4) If RESEND_API_KEY is not set (current state), email sending is gracefully skipped with info log. (5) All data-testid attributes are present: email-prompt-title, checkout-email-input, proceed-to-payment-btn.

email_receipt_feature_verification.backend_checkout_email_storage: Email passed to /api/resume/checkout is stored in resume_payments.email field
email_receipt_feature_verification.backend_verify_payment_background_task: BackgroundTasks.add_task() calls send_payment_receipt after payment confirmation
email_receipt_feature_verification.backend_graceful_resend_handling: Line 38-40 checks for missing RESEND_API_KEY and returns early with info log
email_receipt_feature_verification.frontend_email_modal_appears: showEmailPrompt state triggered when checkoutEmail is empty

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/resume/checkout: 200 OK with checkout_url and session_id (email stored)
